specs.reasoning: Defines the MambaRegistry crate (cclab-mamba-registry), MambaModule trait, ModuleRegistrar structure, MAMBA_MODULES distributed slice, and MbValue conversion helpers (FromMbValue/IntoMbValue). R1 and R3 include test plan for registry unit tests verifying trait implementations and symbol registration.

Specifies the binding crate architecture blueprint that all 8 binding crates follow: lib.rs implements MambaModule trait, types.rs implements FromMbValue/IntoMbValue conversions, methods.rs provides mb_* FFI functions. cclab-schema-mamba serves as the prototype. R4 includes comprehensive test plan for unit tests (MambaModule trait, symbol registration) and integration tests.

Defines 4 of the 8 binding crates in scope: cclab-agent-mamba (agent builder, providers, run), cclab-fetch-mamba (HTTP client, responses), cclab-log-mamba (logger, info/error/debug/warning), cclab-mcp-mamba (MCPServer). All follow the lib.rs/types.rs/methods.rs pattern. R1-R6 and test plan enumerate all mb_* functions for each crate.

Defines MbValue NaN-boxing representation and MbObject reference counting. Essential foundation for all mb_* functions: value constructors (mb_value_int, mb_value_float, mb_value_bool), extractors (mb_value_as_int, mb_value_as_float), and ObjData variants (Str, List, Dict, Instance, etc). Understanding MbValue is critical for binding crate function implementation and testing.

Defines Mamba module system (import resolution, sys.modules caching, circular import handling) that underlies how binding crates are registered and imported. R1-R5 cover module path resolution, caching, and import syntax support that enables 'from cclab.agent import ...' style imports in Mamba scripts that use binding crate functions.
